name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 18 Jul 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.61"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"New Australia Post charge codes have been added for the eParcel API."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the checkout page address field, where an unexpected backspace character was added."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Resolved a problem where the stock adjustment page timed out when opening."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug where custom credit was incorrectly calculated when quotes, cancelled orders, or unapproved orders existed."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in Catch descriptions that wasn't removing <style> tags in HTML."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Corrected the Aged Receivables report to show the correct data when "},{"text":"Show Zero Balances","bold":true},{"text":" is set to No."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Resolved a bug where invalid images in the imagedrop folder cleared existing product images."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the GetWarehouse API call so it no longer returns a blank for the OutputSelector WarehouseState."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
